candidates.name: Greg Steube
candidates.bio: William Gregory Steube (/ˈstuːbi/ STOO-bee; born May 19, 1978) is an American politician serving as the U.S. representative for Florida's 17th congressional district since 2019. His district is based in Sarasota. A member of the Republican Party, Steube served three terms in the Florida House of Representatives, representing the Sarasota-Manatee area from 2010 to 2016, as well as two years in the Florida Senate until 2018, representing Sarasota County and the western part of Charlotte County.

top_stances.summary: Support law enforcement and measures to combat organized retail crime and violent offenders.
top_stances.track_record_note: Voted YEA on hr6260-119 (Keeping Violent Offenders Off Our Streets Act) and hr2853-119 (Combating Organized Retail Crime Act); voted YEA on hconres96-119 expressing support for law enforcement officers.

top_stances.summary: Support military construction and defense appropriations; oppose unilateral withdrawal from military operations.
top_stances.track_record_note: Voted YEA on hr8469-119 (military construction and VA appropriations); voted NAY on hconres75-119 (directive to remove Armed Forces from Iran hostilities).
